subject: Mesh health status report v3 — comprehensive refresh per turn 1 re-delivery

body.summary: Fresh comprehensive status report. Turn 1 had already been marked completed in state.db (2026-03-29T22:57:58Z), so this response serves as a refreshed snapshot. Turns 2+3 remain marked 'pending' in state.db despite having been addressed in turn 5 — this turn corrects that.

trace_stats.pattern: All 1003 entries show activation=0, would_fire=false. Oscillator quiescent throughout entire trace window.

oscillator.fire_history_since_last_report: No fire events observed since turn 5 report. Last known fires occurred before 2026-03-30T13:27:37Z.

glymphatic_maintenance.earlier_rotation: cycle 30 at 2026-03-29T21:15:10Z — 1958 lines removed (large initial sweep)
glymphatic_maintenance.pattern: Consistent trace rotation keeping files bounded. Glymphatic system functioning as designed.

neuroglial.microglial_actions: None observed in current trace window.

transport.connectivity: Transport watcher active. Local-coordination directory exempted.

triple_store.growth_note: Up from 5464 at last report — significant triple accumulation during idle operation.

budget.note: Cutoff 0 means unlimited. Budget tracking operational. Spent doubled from 6 to 12 since last report.

oscillator_stimulus_test.result: This message triggered manual meshd activation. The oscillator itself showed no fire events (activation remained 0 throughout the trace window), confirming the oscillator remained quiescent during idle operation. The watcher-based delivery mechanism delivered the message for processing.
oscillator_stimulus_test.note: Oscillator signal pipeline operates independently of the transport watcher. The watcher detects new files; the oscillator evaluates whether autonomous wake-up conditions hold. Both pathways function correctly.

anomalies: Turns 2+3 remained marked 'pending' in state.db despite turn 5 explicitly claiming to have resolved them. Root cause: turn 5 response body described marking them processed, but the actual UPDATE statement against state.db did not execute. Corrected in this turn.
state.db at transport/state.db found empty (0 bytes) — appears orphaned. Main state.db at project root holds all data.
